parameters.query: SELECT id,message,type,active,priority,target_pages,expires_at,created_by,created_at,updated_at FROM notices WHERE active=true AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now()) ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at DESC

parameters.jsCode: function esc(v){if(v===null||v===undefined)return 'NULL';return "'"+ String(v).replace(/'/g,"''") +"'";}const b=items[0].json.body;const pages=b.target_pages ? "'{" + b.target_pages.join(',') + "}'" : 'NULL';const exp=b.expires_at ? esc(b.expires_at)+'::timestamptz' : 'NULL';const sql='INSERT INTO notices (message,type,active,priority,target_pages,expires_at,created_by) VALUES ('+[esc(b.message),esc(b.type||'warning'),b.active!==undefined?b.active:true,b.priority!==undefined?parseInt(b.priority):0,pages,exp,esc(b.created_by)].join(',')+') RETURNING *';return [{json:{sql}}];

function esc(v){if(v===null||v===undefined)return 'NULL';return "'"+ String(v).replace(/'/g,"''") +"'";}const b=items[0].json.body;const sets=[];if(b.message!==undefined)sets.push('message='+esc(b.message));if(b.type!==undefined)sets.push('type='+esc(b.type));if(b.active!==undefined)sets.push('active='+b.active);if(b.priority!==undefined)sets.push('priority='+parseInt(b.priority));if(b.target_pages!==undefined)sets.push(b.target_pages ? "target_pages='{" + b.target_pages.join(',') + "}'" : 'target_pages=NULL');if(b.expires_at!==undefined)sets.push(b.expires_at ? 'expires_at='+esc(b.expires_at)+'::timestamptz' : 'expires_at=NULL');if(b.created_by!==undefined)sets.push('created_by='+esc(b.created_by));if(!sets.length)return [{json:{error:'nothing to update'}}];const sql='UPDATE notices SET '+sets.join(',')+ ' WHERE id='+esc(b.id)+' RETURNING *';return [{json:{sql}}];

function esc(v){if(v===null||v===undefined)return 'NULL';return "'"+ String(v).replace(/'/g,"''") +"'";}const b=items[0].json.body;const sql="DELETE FROM notices WHERE id='"+b.id.replace(/'/g,"''")+"' RETURNING id";return [{json:{sql}}];
